column1: # Personal "keep" rules for rescue.sh and label_reference.sh.
# Copy this file to keep_rules.local.tsv (gitignored — never committed) and
# edit it to match senders/subjects specific to your own mailbox: specific
# people, organizations, or services you always want rescued from Trash and
# proactively labeled Reference, regardless of age.
# Format: name<TAB>core query fragment, one per line. The name is used for
# the Audit/Rescued/<name> label and PRUNE_LOG.md entries; the query
# fragment is a Gmail search fragment with NO in:trash and NO
# Blank lines and lines starting with # are ignored. The name and query
# fragment must be separated by a literal tab character.
